{| class="wikitable"
|+
!
!Noun
!Verb
!Adjective
!Adverb
|-
|No tone
|neutral
|neutral
|neutral
|neutral
|-
|High tone
|plural (-s)
|continous (-ing)
|comparative (-er)
|comparative (-er)
|-
|Low tone
|collective (analogy)
|perfect (-ed)
|superlative (-est)
|superlative (-est)
|}

[[Category:Illish]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
